title: Reimagined Trims
description: Thoughtfully overhauls the armor trim duplication recipes to make them more interesting and balanced, while still staying true to vanilla.
body:
[![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/92912dea7a95ba9099104c1ea8ff1016955c06cf.webp)](https://discord.gg/TGbBb47Gr5) [![Support Me On Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/ac7d31b51b6a7194dbfc7a31d86a4b3806c1a1f0.png)](https://ko-fi.com/rebel459)

Reimagined Trims overhauls the armor trim system introduced in 1.20 (including any trims added later on) by adding a well-thought, unique and balanced duplication recipe to each and every smithing template recipe, to better showcase each trim's specific achievement and make armor trims viable early-game. The netherite upgrade duplication recipe remains unchanged.

If you'd rather not explore and find the templates to discover the recipes yourself, the duplication recipes can be found in the [Image Gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/reimagined-trims/gallery), alongside information on where to find each armor trim. You can also install a recipe viewer like JEI or use the vanila recipe book, if you'd prefer.

Reimagined Trims is available both as a Fabric or NeoForge mod, or as a datapack, and is only required server-side.

[![Reimagined Trims - Minecraft Storage Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbb82e9608f025991f3ffda86e2a5dee66256a8e_0.webp)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/reimagined-trims)
